The '''Battle of Bothawui''' occurred as a result of intelligence provided by [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] to the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] that the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] military had recently purchased a new class of [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] from the [[Tallaani Shipyards]].

==Prelude==
Seizing upon the opportunity to learn more about a new [[Confederation Fleet]] unit, [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Cha Niathal]] traveled to the [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan sector]] to link up with Alliance military units monitoring Bothan fleet movements. While onboard the warship [[Bounty (warship)|''Bounty'']], a single [[Bothan frigate]], accompanied by five unarmed tenders, approached the Alliance fleet.

==The battle==
After deploying the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] unit [[Mothma Squadron]] to scan the vessel, an additional eighteen Bothan frigates appeared from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Several X-wings from Mothma Squadron were destroyed in the encounter, prompting [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Piris]] to deploy two additional units: [[Qaresi Squadron|Qaresi]] and [[Bronzium Squadron]]. A furious battle erupted, with the ''Bounty'' and the frigate [[Daring (frigate)|''Daring'']] exchanging fierce barrages with the Bothan fleet. Despite having numerical superiority, the firepower deployed by the Alliance forces won the day. Of the nineteen frigates deployed by the Bothans, only seven escaped the battle. The remaining twelve hulls were either destroyed or disabled.

==Aftermath==
While the battle was a Alliance victory, it confirmed [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] Niathal's position that the Defense Force would have to focus the bulk of its efforts to defeat [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]], and [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. However, due to an increasing number of planetary conflicts, the Defense Force was finding itself increasingly stretched.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
